Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7C26 "POLEPOSITIONII-A034-7C26" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $a034 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pole Position II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $A034 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
